questionHtml: Using the data in Table 1 to support your answer, identify two reasons why many economists would consider Country A’s economy to be performing poorly in 2012.
markschemeHtml: NB A response which only states the correct data without specifying that there is high unemployment and deflation may be awarded a maximum of [1].
